sourcePolicy: GitHub main is the official living source. Every agent branches from main, documents work, opens a pull request, and only the integrator promotes an official version.

githubCommands.changelog: npm run agent:changelog -- --agent frontend --branch agent/frontend/v84-chat-ui --summary "Improve chat UI"

guardrails: Start every agent branch from the latest main.
Prioritize project-workspaces/00_project-memory/CHECKPOINT_V90.md, CURRENT_SOURCE.json and AGENT_CHANGELOG.json for project memory.
Do not reintroduce V74/V76 as the current project state.
Document that server-side vision analysis is planned for V91.
Every pull request must pass install, typecheck and build before merge.
